ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mothers" (
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mother */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the mother at the time of delivery */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the mother */,
  "smoke_status" INTEGER /* Smoking status (smoker or non-smoker) */,
  "lwt" INTEGER /* Last weight of the mother during pregnancy */,
  "ptl" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother experienced premature labor */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the mother */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the mother */,
  "family_structure" TEXT /* Family structure of the mother */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Health insurance status of the mother */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infants" (
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infant */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother of the infant */,
  "bwt" INTEGER /* Birth weight of the infant in grams */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the infant */,
  "ftv" INTEGER /* Number of physician visits during the pregnancy */,
  "birth_length" INTEGER /* Length of the infant at birth */,
  "apgar_score" INTEGER /* Apgar score of the infant */,
  "congenital_anomalies" INTEGER /* Indicates if the infant has congenital anomalies */,
  "feeding_method" TEXT /* Feeding method used for the infant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infants_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prenatal_care" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit record */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother who made the visit */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the visit occurred */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the prenatal care visit */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Count of visits made by the mother */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider */,
  "payer_source" TEXT /* Payer source for the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prenatal_care_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prenatal_care_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking status record */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "smoking_status" INTEGER /* Current smoking status (smoker or non-smoker) */,
  "cigarettes_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of cigarettes smoked per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_status_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition record */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Pre-existing medical condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "birth_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each birth outcome record */,
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the infant associated with the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome record */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., healthy, complications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_outcomes_infant_id FOREIGN KEY ("infant_id") REFERENCES infants ("infant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the mother */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the mother */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Language spoken by the mother */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the mother resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the mother's residence */,
  "rural_urban" TEXT /* Rural or urban classification of the mother's residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prenatal_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition record */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition diagnosed during pregnancy */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_received" INTEGER /* Indicates if treatment was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prenatal_conditions_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_history" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother receiving treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment administered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_history_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caregivers" (
  "caregiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caregiver */,
  "infant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the infant for whom the caregiver is responsible */,
  "caregiver_name" TEXT /* Name of the caregiver */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the caregiver to the infant */,
  "caregiver_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the caregiver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caregiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caregivers_infant_id FOREIGN KEY ("infant_id") REFERENCES infants ("infant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the provider works */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider */,
  "provider_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_providers_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (public, private, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, healthcare provider, researcher) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (pass, fail, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)
